inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 adjusted funds from operations $0.393 per diluted share (8-K 2026-02-24 Ex. 99.1); normalized to $0.38 for lower base rent after 13-farm disposition program
inputs.shares_source: Q1 2026 8-K Ex. 99.1 fully diluted common 41,759,181 at 2026-03-31
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Stockholders equity $688.3M / diluted shares at 2026-03-31; farmland at historical cost less depreciation, not fair-value NAV
inputs.dispositions_2025_note: Sold 13 farms (~12,502 gross acres) for ~$95.4M proceeds; ~$21.3M aggregate net gain on sale
inputs.normalization_note: Externally managed UPREIT; monthly dividend exceeds AFFO coverage (~70% FY2025). Lawrence base uses filing AFFO, not GAAP net income (preferred dividends) or disposition gains.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: GAAP equity ~$16.5/sh at 2026-03-31; real estate at cost ~$27/sh gross before ~$11.6/sh leverage; not fair-value NAV
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: [Assumption] cost-basis real estate less debt haircuts; disposition comps ~$7,630/acre on sold farms vs ~$11,700/acre portfolio cost
optionality_gate.notes: Price ~44% below GAAP book; stance gate uses normalized AFFO ten-year path, not book floor alone

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: farmland carried at cost less accumulated depreciation; no fair-value NAV disclosed

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Per-acre fair marks on remaining 144-farm portfolio vs 2025 disposition comps
California water rights monetization value beyond lease revenue
Normalized participation rent on Repositioned Farms after pistachio bonus cycle
External adviser fee drag vs self-managed farmland REIT peers

segments_or_options.label: California water portfolio (~55,649 acre-feet)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] partial mark above cost; FY2025 purchased 1,530 acre-feet at ~$381/acre-foot

segments_or_options.label: Repositioned Farms participation rent (pistachios, tree crops)
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 participation rents ~$20M; Q1 2026 pistachio bonus ~$4.9M

segments_or_options.label: Farm sale / reinvest rotation gains
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 sold 13 farms for ~$95.4M with ~$21.3M net gain; management rotation strategy

bear.notes: Base rent decline persists; dividend cut; participation rent weak; leverage limits acquisitions

base.notes: Normalized AFFO $0.38/sh; lease escalators + modest participation; portfolio rotation at cost

bull.notes: Participation rent scales; water lease revenue; self-funding after ATM pause; multiple re-rate

human_review.notes: Externally managed (Gladstone Management); UPREIT with Series B/C preferred; provisional acreage from FY2025/Q1 2026 disclosures.

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Triple-net lease escalators, Repositioned Farms participation rent on permanent crops, selective farm acquisitions funded by 2025 dispositions
growth_explanation.bear_risk: Fixed base rent fell after 13-farm sales; Q1 2026 AFFO covered only ~54% of quarterly dividend; ATM dilution 3.7M shares in Q1

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Farmland at cost less depreciation; 2025 dispositions produced ~$21.3M net gains vs carrying values

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: Operating leased farmland portfolio; 94.9% occupancy at 2026-03-31

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 2026 net loss to common ($10.0M) driven by preferred dividends/charges, not operating farm losses

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Participation rent on Repositioned Farms; lumpy crop-year timing

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution?
option_scan.evidence: Monthly dividend $0.0467 exceeds normalized AFFO; 159 consecutive monthly payments as of Q1 2026

option_scan.question: Embedded in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Base rent and crop sales in operating revenue; direct-operated farms (~4 farms)

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (7yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
